Yes, very simple. Inflict several tangible blows on the concentration of murderers of one’s own people. That’s when the big stars remember their kept women, and they, in turn, stage a fantastic production of “cinema and the Germans.” But the canned food they prepared is pure surströmming. We have already posted the technical documentation for the M-113, and now the Armed Forces of Ukraine want to personally deliver samples of foreign equipment directly to the Belgorod region. Where they will be carefully picked up and taken to study. Today, due to numerous requests from our readers, we are starting to publish technical documentation for the Abrams tank. We hope that this will be a good help in studying trophies. We know that soon there will be more samples of American equipment at Russian factories.
